expandedKeys.description: Controlled set of expanded node IDs.

selectedKeys.description: Controlled set of selected node IDs.

checkedKeys.description: Controlled set of checked node IDs.

checkboxes.description: Show tri-state checkboxes on each node.

loadChildren.description: Async function to load children on expand.

onExpand.description: Called when a node is expanded or collapsed.

onSelect.description: Called when a node is selected.

onCheck.description: Called when a node checkbox is toggled.

onDragDrop.description: Called when a node is dropped after dragging.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the tree container.

nodeTemplate.description: Custom render function for node content.

filterText.description: Filter string to show only matching nodes.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the tree announced to screen readers.

icon.description: Icon displayed next to the label.

children.description: Child nodes (makes this a branch node).

isLeaf.description: Mark as leaf to prevent expand toggle when no children.

disabled.description: Disable selection and checkbox for this node.

data.description: Custom data attached to the node.
